purpose: Data processing pipeline that filters, transforms, groups, and aggregates JSON user records by domain with statistics output.

functions.name: processUserData
functions.purpose: Core pipeline: parse JSON, filter valid records, normalize fields, group by domain, sort groups, compute stats

functions.name: filter validator
functions.purpose: Check if item has id, displayName, and email fields

functions.name: transform mapper
functions.purpose: Normalize fields: trim/lowercase name, lowercase email, extract domain, format date

functions.name: sortGroup
functions.purpose: Sort each domain group alphabetically by displayName

security.issue: Sandbox escape via Function constructor to leak global object
Anti-debugging detection via recursive function toString checks
Self-modifying function pattern for string lookup table

dataFlow: JSON string → parse → filter (id/name/email) → map (normalize, extract domain) → group by domain → sort groups → compute stats → output
